_about: Organization category (Organization, OrganizationProfile, OrganizationAdminCommands, OrganizationGetProviders, OrganizationProviderStatus, OrganizationAddProviders, OrganizationUpdateProviders, OrganizationEnableProviders, OrganizationTeamBroadcast). Tenant-level profile and configuration endpoints.

POST /api/v1/organization/metrics.description: Queues archival of metric values and triggers a global metrics recompute for the organisation. Used after material data changes to refresh organisation-level dashboards.

GET /api/v1/organization/usage.description: Returns the organisation's account usage (data limit, used volume, days left). Falls back to default values if the usage repository cannot be queried.

GET /api/v1/organization.description: Returns the authenticated context organisation profile, application subdomain, and email-domain signup flag.

PUT /api/v1/organization.description: Updates tenant profile details such as name, description, domain, location, website, logo/banner URLs, colours, theme, and email-domain signup settings. Validates reserved organisation ids, logo URLs, and custom theme colours.

POST /api/v1/organization/configurationS.description: Returns a dictionary of configuration settings filtered to the supplied list of setting keys.

parameters.includeHiddenFromUi: When true, include settings hidden from the UI. Defaults to false.

GET /api/v1/organization/configurationse.description: Returns organisation settings grouped for UI presentation, with optional hidden settings.

parameters.includeHiddenFromUi: When true, include settings hidden from the UI. Defaults to false.

POST /api/v1/organization/configurations.description: Executes a registered organisation setting-group action and returns success or validation/execution messages without throwing for expected group-action failures.

GET /api/v1/organization/configurationse.description: Returns organisation configuration settings as typed setting models. Hidden settings can be included when requested. Returns 403 when the supplied organisation id does not match the caller's organisation.

parameters.includeHiddenFromUi: When true, include settings hidden from the UI. Defaults to false.

GET /api/v1/organization/configurationse.description: Returns visible organisation configuration settings and values. Hidden settings can be included when requested. Returns 403 when the supplied organisation id does not match the caller's organisation.

parameters.includeHiddenFromUi: When true, include settings hidden from the UI. Defaults to false.

PUT /api/v1/organization/configurationva.description: Validates and updates multiple organisation configuration settings in one request, returning validation messages when settings are invalid.

GET /api/v1/organization/configurationva.description: Returns one organisation configuration setting value by configuration key.

PUT /api/v1/organization/configurationva.description: Updates a single organisation configuration setting after validating data type and setting-specific constraints. Secret values are masked in audit records.

PUT /api/v1/organization/disablesecurity.description: Disables account security filtering for the organisation after verifying the path organisation id matches the authenticated user's organisation.

PUT /api/v1/organization/enablesecurityf.description: Enables account security filtering for the organisation after verifying the path organisation id matches the authenticated user's organisation.

GET /api/v1/organization/securityfilter/.description: Returns whether account security filtering is enabled for the organisation.

GET /api/v1/organization/hasproviders.description: Returns whether the caller's organisation has any configured providers.

GET /api/v1/organization/providers.description: Returns the providers configured for the caller's organisation with provider name, enabled state, and the user-profile (name/logo) of the user that configured each provider. Multiple overloads accept different filter combinations; passing `id` narrows to a single provider definition. Requires the Administration.Provider RACI claim.

parameters.id: Optional provider id to filter by.

PUT /api/v1/organization/providers.description: Enables or disables a provider configuration for the caller's organisation. Activating a previously-unapproved provider also approves it; deactivating cancels its scheduled crawls and (for enrichers) cancels recurring enrichment. The action publishes a `ProviderStatusChangeEvent` and is audit-logged with provider-type-specific descriptions. Returns 404 if the provider cannot be found. Requires the Administration.Provider RACI claim.

parameters.active: True to enable, false to disable.
parameters.accountId: Optional account id (used by the multi-account overload).

POST /api/v1/organization/admin/commands.description: Queues an `ExternalSearchCommand` for the supplied entity within the caller's organisation. Set `ignoreCache=true` (the default) to bypass cached enricher query results. Returns 400 for invalid ids and 404 when the entity cannot be found. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.

parameters.ignoreCache: When true, ignore cached external-search query results. Defaults to true.

POST /api/v1/organization/admin/commands.description: Queues a `PostProcessingEntityCommand` for the supplied entity within the caller's organisation. Returns 400 for invalid ids and 404 when the entity does not exist. Requires the Administration.Data RACI claim.
